summary: Connected the classifier-free GoodDirection bridge to the public generated coverage assembly. This adds a central all-GoodDirection interval predicate for translation and a public semantic coverage constructor consuming nonidentity residual intervals plus all-GoodDirection translation intervals.
memory_notes: Both builds were run serially. The public exhaustive adapter peaked at roughly 3.14 GiB RSS, safely below the 45 GiB working ceiling.
remaining_gap: This is a public API bridge, not full generated evidence. Full AP still needs generated source/row membership chunks proving AllGoodRankKilled or the AP.2 source/row bridge predicates over the full rank range, plus the nonidentity residual coverage interval.
